summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for Owner P0 features (No-show tracker and Revenue Insights) and cross-flow checks. Functional flows passed, but owner APIs are publicly accessible without authentication.

critical.issue: No auth enforcement on owner endpoints. Unauthenticated request returns 200 and booking data.

action_items: Add real owner auth guard for all /api/owner/* routes (token/session verification on backend, not only frontend sessionStorage gate).
Block unauthenticated reads/writes for owner booking status updates and reporting endpoints.
Retest owner dashboard after backend auth middleware/dependency is added.
critical_code_review_comments: Owner PIN fallback uses default ('9999') in backend if env missing; this weakens security posture.
Owner endpoints currently trust frontend navigation guard only; this is bypassable via direct API calls.
Functional implementation for no-show follow-up metadata and insights aggregation is correct based on tested payloads.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_OWNER_* bookings via public POST /api/bookings for regression; statuses set to done/no_show during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest regression file is reusable and passed 7/7. UI checks verified owner tabs, no-show list/metrics, insights KPIs/chart, ₹ currency formatting, and 12-hour times. Validate again after auth guard changes.
rca of the issue: RCA: backend owner routes (e.g., /api/owner/bookings, /api/owner/no-shows, /api/owner/revenue-insights, /api/owner/bookings/{id}/status) do not require/validate auth token. Repro: curl GET /api/owner/bookings?date=<today> without headers returns 200. Impact: sensitive business data + state-changing owner actions exposed. Mitigation: add dependency-based auth (Bearer/session token validation) to all owner endpoints and reject with 401/403 when absent/invalid.
